markdownRemark.excerpt: بسم الله الحمد الله والصلاة والسلام على رسول الله وبعد Dār As-Ṣaḥāba Association is pleased to announce 6-week intensive summer workshop for boys on the basics…
markdownRemark.html:
بسم الله الحمد الله والصلاة والسلام على رسول الله وبعد

Dār As-Ṣaḥāba Association is pleased to announce 6-week intensive summer workshop for boys on the basics of Islām.

The workshop will be held 4 days a week by our brother Abū ʿAbd Allāh Ayub Peart. You are encouraged to register boys aged 10 and above, taking advantage of this great opportunity. For additional details on workshop timings, content and registration please refer to the poster below or the attached pdf.

Jazākallaahu Khayran.

frontmatter.title: LECTURE: “Importance of At-Tawḥīd” and "Money in Islām" by Ayyūb Peart and Aḥmad b. ʿUmar
